hero.title: Guarding Every
hero.subtitle: HeartSound — A home-grade heart sound detection system. 30-second check for cardiac health. Edge AI inference keeps your data private. Let care transcend distance.

credentials.title: Core Credentials
credentials.subtitle: Solid technical expertise and intellectual property form the foundation of our innovation

pain.title: Family Heart Health Shouldn't Be a Guessing Game
pain.subtitle: Traditional cardiac check-ups are expensive, time-consuming, and inaccessible for elderly parents living alone. HeartSound changes everything.
pain.pain1Desc: Long queues, blood tests, and complicated procedures — overwhelming for elderly parents alone
pain.pain2Desc: Working far from home, you can only worry when parents feel unwell
pain.pain3Desc: Smart bands with complex charging and confusing data end up in drawers

features.title: Why Choose HeartSound
features.subtitle: Three core technologies setting new standards for home cardiac health management
features.f1Desc: Deep learning models run locally on Raspberry Pi. Heart sound data never leaves your home. Analysis complete within 5 seconds.
features.f2Desc: No app download needed. Scan to use instantly. Detection reports, health records, and AI health assistant — all in one mini program.
features.f3Desc: Each detection is automatically archived with health trend charts. Family members can view remotely, keeping care connected across distances.

howItWorks.title: Four Simple Steps to Guard Heart Health
howItWorks.step1Desc: Scan the device QR code via WeChat, connect in one second
howItWorks.step2Desc: Place the stethoscope on the left chest, wait quietly for 30 seconds
howItWorks.step3Desc: Deep learning model analyzes heart sound signals in real time
howItWorks.step4Desc: Three-level risk assessment with professional health advice

cta.title: Let AI Guard Your Family's Heart Health
cta.subtitle: Start today — give love a visible insurance

product.heroDesc: An intelligent detection system integrating heart sound collection, AI analysis, and health records
product.featuresSubtitle: Six functional modules for comprehensive cardiac health protection
product.f1Desc: Deep learning-based heart sound classification model, capable of identifying normal heart sounds, systolic murmurs, diastolic murmurs, extra heart sounds, and more
product.f2Desc: 30fps high-refresh-rate heart sound waveform visualization, letting you see every heartbeat moment
product.f3Desc: Detection records automatically archived in the cloud, supporting long-term health trend tracking and historical comparison
product.f4Desc: LLM-powered intelligent Q&A system, ready to answer heart health questions anytime
product.f5Desc: Built-in voice assistant on Raspberry Pi device, gently announcing operational guidance — no phone needed for seniors
product.f6Desc: One-click share detection reports to family chat groups, giving distant children peace of mind
product.gallerySubtitle: From exterior design to hardware internals, every detail crafted for excellence
product.dataCaption1: AI Model Training Data — Multi-dimensional Feature Extraction
product.dataCaption2: AI Model Performance — Accuracy Comparison Analysis
product.flowSubtitle: Complete a professional-grade heart sound detection in 30 seconds
